infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Moto Blockers needs your location to announce blocker positions as you approach intersections.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Moto Blockers needs your location to announce blocker positions during your ride.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Moto Blockers needs background location to announce blocker positions during your ride.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Moto Blockers to use your location to announce blocker positions during motorcycle rides.
